title: Blue Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Blue Squadron''' was the name of several [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadrons:
[[File:Blue_Squadron_Protector_XW2.png|thumb|right|250px|A Blue Squadron V-19 Torrent starfighter at the Battle of Coruscant]]

==Canon==
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Republic Defense Coalition)|Blue Squadron]]''', a [[Republic Defense Coalition]] unit during the [[High Republic Era]]
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Galactic Republic)|Blue Squadron]]''', a [[Republic Navy]] unit during the [[Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Blue Squadron]]''', a Rebel Alliance starfighter squadron that participated in the [[Battle of Scarif]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[77 Squadron]]''', a [[New Republic]] squadron that participated in the [[Battle of Jakku]] under the name Blue Squadron.
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Resistance)|Blue Squadron]]''', a [[Resistance]] starfighter squadron active during the conflict against the [[First Order]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Je'daii)|Blue Squadron]]''', [[Je'daii]] squadron that fought in the [[Invasion of the Tython system]].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Jedi Order)|Blue Squadron]]''', [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] squadron that fought in the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]] and throughout the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Blue Squadron]]''', several [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] squadrons during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Alderaanian Resistance)|Blue Squadron]]''', [[Alderaanian Resistance]] squadron that participated in the [[Battle of Byss]].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]]''', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] squadron that participated in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Eyrie Base)|Blue Squadron]]''', Rebel Alliance squadron based at [[Eyrie Base]].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Bothan)|Blue Squadron]]''', a Rebel Alliance-aligned [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]] squadron that flew in an [[Raid on the Suprosa|attack on the ''Suprosa'']].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (New Republic)|Blue Squadron]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] squadron that fought in the [[Battle of Folor]] and the [[Battle of Calamari]].
*'''[[Blue Squadron (Thurse)|Blue Squadron]]''', a New Republic [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] squadron that was part of the ''[[Thurse]]''{{'s}} complement.
